professor.title: Assistant Professor
professor.biography_text: Yizhuo Wang received the Ph.D. degree in computer science from Beijing Institute of Technology, China, in 2005. He was a visiting scholar at University of California, Irvine from 2010 to 2011.

education_experiences.raw_text: Yizhuo Wang received the Ph.D. degree in computer science from Beijing Institute of Technology, China, in 2005.
He was a visiting scholar at University of California, Irvine from 2010 to 2011.

publications.title: An Adaptive and Hierarchical Task Scheduling Scheme for Multi-core Clusters
